turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: hello ! how are you doing today ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: as good as can be expected . i'm pregnant for the first time .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: congratulations . i hope the baby is healthy and has no asthma like i do .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i live out the the country so asthma wouldn't be good .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: exactly . so lets hope for the best for the baby . you know the sex yet ?

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i do not . my husband wants a boy , he is in the army .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: nice . maybe a future hockey player to . i use to play .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: perhaps , but my father is a minister and he wouldn't like that .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: well true . but being athletic and a runner . sports is a good thing .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: i agree and hopefully my kid likes horses . i have one named beauty .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: oh nice . sometime i think i'm too tall to dance .

turns.speaker: model_b
turns.content: oh , you can never be too tall to dance !

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: 6 ft . feels like i am towering over these females .

turns.speaker: model_a
turns.content: well if your sure i will keep dancing . i love it too hate to give it up .
